SELECT v1."VendorId", v1."ApprovalStatusId", v1."CompanyEmail", v1."CompanyPhoneNumber", v1."ContactPersonName", v1."CreatedAt", v1."GSTNumber", v1."IsActive", v1."ReviewedAt", v1."ReviewedByAdminId", v1."VendorCompanyName", s."VendorUserId", s."AddedByVendorUserId", s."CreatedAt", s."IsActive", s."UserId", s."VendorId", s."VendorRoleId", s."UserId0", s."CreatedAt0", s."Email", s."FirstName", s."HashedKey", s."IsActive0", s."LastName", s."Password", s."PhoneNumber", s."RoleId", s."UpdatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT v."VendorId", v."ApprovalStatusId", v."CompanyEmail", v."CompanyPhoneNumber", v."ContactPersonName", v."CreatedAt", v."GSTNumber", v."IsActive", v."ReviewedAt", v."ReviewedByAdminId", v."VendorCompanyName"
    FROM "Vendor" AS v
    WHERE v."VendorId" = @vendorId
    LIMIT 1
) AS v1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v0."VendorUserId", v0."AddedByVendorUserId", v0."CreatedAt", v0."IsActive", v0."UserId", v0."VendorId", v0."VendorRoleId", u."UserId" AS "UserId0", u."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", u."Email", u."FirstName", u."HashedKey", u."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", u."LastName", u."Password", u."PhoneNumber", u."RoleId", u."UpdatedAt"
    FROM "VendorUser" AS v0
    INNER JOIN "User" AS u ON v0."UserId" = u."UserId"
    WHERE v0."VendorRoleId" = 1
) AS s ON v1."VendorId" = s."VendorId"
ORDER BY v1."VendorId", s."VendorUserId"

SELECT v1."VendorId", v1."ApprovalStatusId", v1."CompanyEmail", v1."CompanyPhoneNumber", v1."ContactPersonName", v1."CreatedAt", v1."GSTNumber", v1."IsActive", v1."ReviewedAt", v1."ReviewedByAdminId", v1."VendorCompanyName", s."VendorUserId", s."AddedByVendorUserId", s."CreatedAt", s."IsActive", s."UserId", s."VendorId", s."VendorRoleId", s."UserId0", s."CreatedAt0", s."Email", s."FirstName", s."HashedKey", s."IsActive0", s."LastName", s."Password", s."PhoneNumber", s."RoleId", s."UpdatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT v."VendorId", v."ApprovalStatusId", v."CompanyEmail", v."CompanyPhoneNumber", v."ContactPersonName", v."CreatedAt", v."GSTNumber", v."IsActive", v."ReviewedAt", v."ReviewedByAdminId", v."VendorCompanyName"
    FROM "Vendor" AS v
    WHERE v."VendorId" = @vendorId
    LIMIT 1
) AS v1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v0."VendorUserId", v0."AddedByVendorUserId", v0."CreatedAt", v0."IsActive", v0."UserId", v0."VendorId", v0."VendorRoleId", u."UserId" AS "UserId0", u."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", u."Email", u."FirstName", u."HashedKey", u."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", u."LastName", u."Password", u."PhoneNumber", u."RoleId", u."UpdatedAt"
    FROM "VendorUser" AS v0
    INNER JOIN "User" AS u ON v0."UserId" = u."UserId"
    WHERE v0."VendorRoleId" = 1
) AS s ON v1."VendorId" = s."VendorId"
ORDER BY v1."VendorId", s."VendorUserId"

2026-06-07 18:48:49.198 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (5ms) [Parameters=[@vendorId='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT v1."VendorId", v1."ApprovalStatusId", v1."CompanyEmail", v1."CompanyPhoneNumber", v1."ContactPersonName", v1."CreatedAt", v1."GSTNumber", v1."IsActive", v1."ReviewedAt", v1."ReviewedByAdminId", v1."VendorCompanyName", s."VendorUserId", s."AddedByVendorUserId", s."CreatedAt", s."IsActive", s."UserId", s."VendorId", s."VendorRoleId", s."UserId0", s."CreatedAt0", s."Email", s."FirstName", s."HashedKey", s."IsActive0", s."LastName", s."Password", s."PhoneNumber", s."RoleId", s."UpdatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT v."VendorId", v."ApprovalStatusId", v."CompanyEmail", v."CompanyPhoneNumber", v."ContactPersonName", v."CreatedAt", v."GSTNumber", v."IsActive", v."ReviewedAt", v."ReviewedByAdminId", v."VendorCompanyName"
    FROM "Vendor" AS v
    WHERE v."VendorId" = @vendorId
    LIMIT 1
) AS v1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v0."VendorUserId", v0."AddedByVendorUserId", v0."CreatedAt", v0."IsActive", v0."UserId", v0."VendorId", v0."VendorRoleId", u."UserId" AS "UserId0", u."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", u."Email", u."FirstName", u."HashedKey", u."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", u."LastName", u."Password", u."PhoneNumber", u."RoleId", u."UpdatedAt"
    FROM "VendorUser" AS v0
    INNER JOIN "User" AS u ON v0."UserId" = u."UserId"
    WHERE v0."VendorRoleId" = 1
) AS s ON v1."VendorId" = s."VendorId"
ORDER BY v1."VendorId", s."VendorUserId"

    LEFT JOIN "ProductImage" AS p7 ON p4."ProductVariantId" = p7."ProductVariantId"

FROM "Product" AS p
INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p0 ON p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p0."ProductApprovalStatusId"
INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p1 ON p."ProductStatusId" = p1."ProductStatusId"
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p2 ON p."ProductSubCategoryId" = p2."ProductSubCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "Vendor" AS v ON p."VendorId" = v."VendorId"
LEFT JOIN "ProductImage" AS p3 ON p."ProductId" = p3."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4."ProductVariantId", p4."AddedByVendorUserId", p4."CreatedAt", p4."HeightInCm", p4."LengthInCm", p4."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p4."Price", p4."ProductApprovalStatusId", p4."ProductId", p4."ProductVariantStatusId", p4."SKU", p4."UpdatedAt", p4."WeightInKgs", p4."WidthInCm", i."InventoryId", i."AddressId", i."AvailableQuantity", i."IsActive", i."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId0", i."ReservedQuantity", i."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", s."ProductVariantAttributeId", s."AttributeValue", s."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", s."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", s."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", s."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId1", s."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt1", s."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s."AttributeMasterId", s."CreatedAt0" AS "CreatedAt00", s."IsActive0" AS "IsActive00", s."ProductSubCategoryId", s."AttributeMasterId0", s."AttributeName", s."CreatedAt1", s."IsActive1", p7."ProductImageId", p7."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId0", p7."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt2", p7."DisplayOrderId", p7."ImageUrl", p7."IsMainImage", p7."ProductId" AS "ProductId0", p7."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId2", p7."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt2"
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p4
    LEFT JOIN "Inventory" AS i ON p4."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p5."ProductVariantAttributeId", p5."AttributeValue", p5."CreatedAt", p5."IsActive", p5."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p5."ProductVariantId", p5."UpdatedAt", p6."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" AS "ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", p6."AttributeMasterId", p6."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p6."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p6."ProductSubCategoryId", a."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a."AttributeName", a."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive1"
        FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p5

        INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p6."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
    ) AS s ON p4."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN "ProductImage" AS p7 ON p4."ProductVariantId" = p7."ProductVariantId"
) AS s0 ON p."ProductId" = s0."ProductId"
WHERE p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 5

FROM "Product" AS p
INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p1 ON p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p1."ProductApprovalStatusId"
INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p2 ON p."ProductStatusId" = p2."ProductStatusId"
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p3 ON p."ProductSubCategoryId" = p3."ProductSubCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "Vendor" AS v ON p."VendorId" = v."VendorId"
LEFT JOIN "ProductImage" AS p4 ON p."ProductId" = p4."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p5."ProductVariantId", p5."AddedByVendorUserId", p5."CreatedAt", p5."HeightInCm", p5."LengthInCm", p5."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p5."Price", p5."ProductApprovalStatusId", p5."ProductId", p5."ProductVariantStatusId", p5."SKU", p5."UpdatedAt", p5."WeightInKgs", p5."WidthInCm", i0."InventoryId", i0."AddressId", i0."AvailableQuantity", i0."IsActive", i0."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId0", i0."ReservedQuantity", i0."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", s."ProductVariantAttributeId", s."AttributeValue", s."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", s."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", s."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", s."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId1", s."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt1", s."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s."AttributeMasterId", s."CreatedAt0" AS "CreatedAt00", s."IsActive0" AS "IsActive00", s."ProductSubCategoryId", s."AttributeMasterId0", s."AttributeName", s."CreatedAt1", s."IsActive1", p8."ProductImageId", p8."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId0", p8."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt2", p8."DisplayOrderId", p8."ImageUrl", p8."IsMainImage", p8."ProductId" AS "ProductId0", p8."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId2", p8."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt2"
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p5
    LEFT JOIN "Inventory" AS i0 ON p5."ProductVariantId" = i0."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p6."ProductVariantAttributeId", p6."AttributeValue", p6."CreatedAt", p6."IsActive", p6."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p6."ProductVariantId", p6."UpdatedAt", p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" AS "ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", p7."AttributeMasterId", p7."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p7."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p7."ProductSubCategoryId", a."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a."AttributeName", a."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive1"
        FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p6
        INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p7 ON p6."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
        INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p7."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
    ) AS s ON p5."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN "ProductImage" AS p8 ON p5."ProductVariantId" = p8."ProductVariantId"
) AS s0 ON p."ProductId" = s0."ProductId"
WHERE p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p."ProductStatusId" = 2 AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p0
    WHERE p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId" AND p0."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p0."ProductVariantStatusId" = 2 AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "Inventory" AS i
        WHERE p0."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId" AND i."AvailableQuantity" > 0))
ORDER BY p."ProductId", p1."ProductApprovalStatusId", p2."ProductStatusId", p3."ProductSubCategoryId", v."VendorId", p4."ProductImageId", s0."ProductVariantId", s0."InventoryId", s0."ProductVariantAttributeId", s0."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s0."AttributeMasterId0"
